title: Flea Treatment in Port Washington
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Port Washington, Long Island. Expert flea extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Port Washington, tackling infestations in homes, apartments, and businesses across this scenic waterfront community. Our certified technicians use advanced, pet-safe methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, ensuring your property remains flea-free. With pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on property size and infestation severity, we deliver effective, affordable solutions for Port Washington residents and business owners.
whyUs: Our team brings over 15 years of experience serving Long Island communities like Port Washington, with specialized knowledge of the unique pest challenges faced by waterfront properties and historic homes in the area. We offer same-day service, use family and pet-safe treatments, and provide a 30-day warranty on all flea extermination services.
localContext: Port Washington's tree-lined streets, proximity to Manhasset Bay, and abundance of parks and outdoor spaces create ideal conditions for flea activity, especially during warmer months. From the historic estates near Sands Point to the multi-family residences downtown and waterfront properties along the peninsula, we've successfully treated flea infestations in every neighborhood of Port Washington.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Port Washington?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Port Washington range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment service in Port Washington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services throughout Port Washington and surrounding Long Island areas. Once you contact us, we can typically schedule an inspection within 24 hours and begin treatment immediately if needed.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved, pet-safe, and child-safe flea treatment products. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, but our methods are specifically chosen to be safe for families while remaining highly effective against fleas at all life stages.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your flea treatment services in Port Washington?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide a 30-day warranty on all flea treatments. If you experience any flea activity within 30 days of our service, we'll return and re-treat your property at no additional charge. We also provide guidance on preventing future infestations to ensure long-term results.
